problem id: c987c34f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11000000 -> 01100000
  10101100 -> 01010110
  10101111 -> 00010111
  00010000 -> 00001000
  11010100 -> 01101010
  11000111 -> 00000011
  01110101 -> 00011010
  01011011 -> 10001101
  01000101 -> 00000010

query: 10010011
predicted answer: 10001001
